description_long: This is a large, rectangular outdoor trash bin made primarily of green plastic, commonly seen in urban and suburban environments for waste collection. The bin features a hinged, flat lid with a slightly raised central section, designed to keep contents covered and protected from the elements. Two robust black wheels are attached at the rear base, allowing for easy tilting and rolling during transport. Sturdy, side-mounted handles are present near the top edge, providing a secure grip for lifting or maneuvering the bin. The overall surface is smooth with a matte finish, and the bin is unmarked, lacking any visible signage or recycling symbols. Its size and construction suggest it is intended for curbside waste collection and can hold a significant volume of refuse.
description: A large green plastic trash bin with a flat hinged lid, black wheels, and side handles, designed for outdoor waste collection. The surface is smooth and unmarked, suitable for curbside use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green body, one black wheel, and a side-mounted handle near the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat lid, both black wheels partially visible, and the unmarked smooth surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the green body, one black wheel, and a side-mounted handle near the top.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting both black wheels, the back of the lid, and the two side handles extending outward.
attribute_handle_design: side-mounted external handles near the top
